creator: cth-freebsd@pm.me
text:
Created attachment 248341
New Port patch

RedNotebook is a personal desktop journal application written in Python.

This used to be in ports, but was removed due to relying on an old webkit-gtk2 port back in 2019. The application has been updated and I created this new port.

See attached patch. I use this application, and am happy to be able to contribute this back to the community and maintain it.

Thanks!
Travis
